title: Variable Scope
description: Understand local vs global variables inside functions.

slides.title: Where Can Variables Be Seen?
Demonstrating Scope
Accessing Global Variables
Avoid Global Variables When Possible
slides.content:
## Best Practice

Using `global` can make code harder to debug and maintain. It's better to pass values as parameters and return results. We'll see more in later lessons.

quizData.explanation: Inside test(), $x is a local variable, not affecting the global $x. So global $x remains 5.
